a_founder_p1: LocalReply is a solo project, built with conviction from Switzerland. No fundraising, no marketing team — just a carefully crafted product, iterated based on real customer feedback.
a_founder_p2: This independence is a strength: every decision is made in the best interest of the product and its users, without external pressure. Customers aren't metrics — they're real businesses with real problems.
a_mission_sub: Every business deserves a smart assistant. LocalReply makes it accessible, affordable and simple — starting today.
a_pull: European independent businesses represent millions of shops. They deserve better than a simple contact form.
a_story1: It started with an obvious observation: small businesses — hairdressers, restaurateurs, plumbers, craftspeople — spend hours answering the same questions. What are your hours? How much is a haircut? Do you have availability on Monday? Simple questions, but they take up precious time.
a_story2: Meanwhile, AI is revolutionizing large enterprises. Smart chatbots, automated scheduling, real-time analytics — it all exists, but remains reserved for companies with tech teams and substantial budgets.
a_story3: LocalReply was designed to bridge this gap. An AI assistant simple to set up, operational in 5 minutes, speaking 8 languages and adapting to any industry — no technical skills required.
a_story4: Built from Switzerland, with a particular sensitivity to European multilingualism and local markets, LocalReply aims to become the reference assistant for independent businesses across Europe.
a_sub: LocalReply was born from a simple belief: small businesses deserve the same tools as large enterprises.
a_v1_desc: A business that opens LocalReply should be operational in 5 minutes, not 5 hours. Technology should get out of the way.
a_v2_desc: 8 natively supported languages (FR, EN, DE, IT, ES, PT, NL, PL), European hosting, GDPR compliant. Not a translated version of an American product — built for Europe.
a_v3_desc: No hidden fees, no dark patterns. An honest product with clear pricing and a firm commitment to data protection.
